job_title: Sr Full Stack Engineer, PayPal Shopping
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: JavaScript, Node.js, React, GraphQL, REST API development
skill_match_scores: JavaScript:0.5, Node.js:0.5, React:1.0, GraphQL:1.0, REST API development:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor's degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience, Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles, Advises immediate management on project-level issues, Guides junior engineers, Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices, Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions
preferred_quals: Proficiency in JavaScript/Node.js (Golang experience is a plus), React (UI/UX) experience preferred, GraphQL and REST API development experience preferred, Cloud platform experience (GCP, AWS, etc.) preferred, Solid foundation in data structures & algorithms, error handling, and debugging, Proven experience creating automated unit, integration, and functional test suites, Background working with large-scale, distributed, high-availability systems, Hands-on experience with Kubernetes, Docker, CircleCI, Harness and Git, SQL and NoSQL database knowledge helpful, Experience working with Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) a plus
core_responsibilities: Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles, Advises immediate management on project-level issues, Guides junior engineers, Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices, Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions
job_summary: PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for over 25 years, and they are seeking a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer to join their Shopping Team. In this role, you will be responsible for building secure, high-performing applications and features, guiding junior engineers, and collaborating with product teams in an agile environment.
